vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft Outlook Remote Code Execution
vulnerabilities.description: Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Microsoft Outlook via malformed MIME link parsing.

vulnerabilities.name: Out-of-bounds Memory Read in V8
vulnerabilities.description: Out-of-bounds memory access in Google Chrome V8 engine — actively exploited in the wild.

vulnerabilities.name: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset DDoS
vulnerabilities.description: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset attack allows amplified DDoS via server-stream cancellation.

vulnerabilities.name: OpenSSH Server Banner Exposure
vulnerabilities.description: OpenSSH server version banner is exposed, aiding targeted attacks.

vulnerabilities.name: JetBrains TeamCity Auth Bypass
vulnerabilities.description: Authentication bypass in JetBrains TeamCity allows admin account takeover.

vulnerabilities.name: Terrapin SSH Prefix Truncation
vulnerabilities.description: Terrapin attack on SSH — prefix truncation in CBC/ChaCha20 modes.

vulnerabilities.name: Windows Kernel Null Pointer EoP
vulnerabilities.description: Windows kernel null pointer dereference — local privilege escalation.

vulnerabilities.name: Cisco IOS XE Default Credential
vulnerabilities.description: Cisco IOS XE Web UI exposes default credentials on HTTP interface.
